daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. There's this quiet intensity building beneath the surface—trust it. The universe is basically handing you permission to be unapologetically yourself today.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, emotional honesty is your superpower right now. Someone's probably noticing your energy. Keep it real, keep it raw, and let connections deepen naturally.
daily.career: Your instincts are sharper than usual. That idea you've been sitting on? Today's the day to test it out. Your confidence isn't cocky—it's earned. People are listening.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not lazy avoidance. Move in ways that feel good, hydrate like it's your job, and honor what you actually need instead of what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you, Scorpio. Mercury's vibes are pushing you toward clarity and honest conversations. Trust your gut—it's been right before and it's right now.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Someone might surprise you with their depth. Don't overthink the signals; sometimes the simplest explanation hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is chef's kiss this week. A project or idea you've been sitting on deserves attention. Low-key confidence moves will get you further than big declarations.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities—maybe walks, stretching, or something that connects you to the earth. Pay attention to what makes you feel solid and peaceful, not just productive.
